content.headline: Get the Helium Mobile app and unlock your free subscription.
content.subtitle: A fast, no-catch path to activating your free Helium Mobile plan — download the app, sign up in under a minute, and you're done. Built for US residents on any device.
content.heroCardCopy: One tap to the official Helium Mobile app page, a quick free sign-up, and your activation is complete — nothing else to buy.

features.title: One clear step
features.description: Tap Continue, install the Helium Mobile app, and create your free account. That's the whole process.

features.title: Built for the US
features.description: This offer is available to real US residents on any device — phone, tablet, or desktop browser.

features.title: Transparent terms
features.description: No hidden purchase, no VPN or proxy traffic, no self-completion — just a genuine sign-up.

benefits.title: Free to join
benefits.description: The Helium Mobile subscription in this offer is completely free to activate — no payment details required.

benefits.title: Minutes, not hours
benefits.description: Downloading the app and completing sign-up typically takes less than a couple of minutes.

benefits.title: Real, verified offer
benefits.description: This links directly to the official Helium Mobile activation flow — no lookalike pages or shortcuts.

steps.title: Continue
steps.description: Tap the Continue button to open the Helium Mobile app page for your device.

steps.title: Sign up
steps.description: Create your free Helium Mobile account — no credit card is required for this offer.

steps.title: You're set
steps.description: Once your sign-up is complete, your part is done — no further steps needed.

faq.question: Is this offer really free?
faq.answer: Yes. This offer only requires downloading the Helium Mobile app and completing a free subscription sign-up.

faq.question: Who can complete this offer?
faq.answer: It's open to real people located in the United States, on any device. VPN or proxy traffic is not eligible.

faq.question: How long does sign-up take?
faq.answer: Most people finish the app download and free sign-up in a couple of minutes.

content.privacyText: We collect only the information needed to operate the site experience, consent preferences, and optional analytics. You can manage your choice from the cookie banner.
content.termsText: This landing page links to a third-party offer (Helium Mobile). Eligibility, terms, and rewards are determined by the offer provider, not by this site.
content.ctaTitle: Ready to activate your free Helium Mobile plan?
content.ctaCopy: Tap Continue to open the official sign-up page and finish in under a couple of minutes.

seo.title: Helium Mobile — Free Sign-Up Offer
seo.description: Get the Helium Mobile app and activate your free subscription in a couple of minutes. Available for US residents on any device.
seo.keywords: helium mobile, free subscription, app signup, us offer
